zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Whitman於大約1463年出生在英國賀特福爾時，他的父親Thomas Richard Wightman39歲，母親Mary Reynolds34歲。他於1500年與Alice Axtell結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年6月2日在英國巴金哈姆爾馮 李享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Whitman于大约1463年出生在英国賀特福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Richard Wightman39岁，母亲Mary Reynolds34岁。他于1500年与Alice Axtell结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年6月2日在英国巴金哈姆爾馮 李享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whitman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whiteman
meanings: Native American (also White Man): translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota Sioux wašiču(ŋ), meaning ‘white man’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Weissmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Whitman was born about 1463, in Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Richard Wightman, was 39 and his mother, Mary Reynolds, was 34. He married Alice Axtell in 1500. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 2 June 1549, in The Lee, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Whitman est né environ 1463, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Richard Wightman, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mary Reynolds, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Alice Axtell en 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1549, à The Lee, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Whitman um 1463 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richard Wightman 39 und seine Mutter Mary Reynolds 34. Er hat 1500 Alice Axtell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juni 1549 im Alter von 87 Jahren in The Lee, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Whitman è nato il circa 1463 nel Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Richard Wightman, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mary Reynolds, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Alice Axtell nel 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 2 giugno 1549, nel The Lee, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Whitmanが約1463年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Richard Wightmanは39歳，母Mary Reynoldsは34歳であった。1500年にAlice Axtellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年6月2日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアス リーで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Whitman(이)가 대략 1463년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richard Wightman(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Reynolds(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1500년 Alice Axtell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 6월 2일 영국 벅잉함실르 테 리에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Whitman nasceu aproximadamente 1463, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richard Wightman, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mary Reynolds, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Axtell em 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1549, em The Lee, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Whitman родился около 1463 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richard Wightman было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Reynolds, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Axtell в 1500 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 2 июня 1549 г. в местности т ли, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Whitman nació aproximadamente 1463, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Richard Wightman, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mary Reynolds, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Alice Axtell en 1500. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de junio de 1549, en The Lee, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
